prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华东师范大学在重庆物理类最低位次分别为约3980名→2985名→2814名→3507名→3140名，整体呈波动走势。2021至2023年位次持续前移（从3980升至2814），2024年大幅后移至3507，2025年又回弹至3140，近两年波动幅度较大（约300–700名），2025年基准约3140名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划：2021年40人、2022年39人、2023年39人、2024年35人、2025年41人；2026年计划44人，较2025年扩招3人（增幅约7.3%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东师范大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第29名（近年稳定在28–31名区间），属于全国顶尖师范类高校，办学层次极高；2026年高考周期声誉数据中未见华东师范大学有明显负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第28位（评价"较热"），综合热度约170万，短视频曝光量处于中上水平；2021–2025年均无投档断档或录取异常记录，整体声誉平稳偏正面；第五轮学科评估中，华东师范大学拥有A+学科3个（体育学、教育学、统计学），A学科7个（世界史、中国语言文学、地理学、心理学、数学、生态学、软件工程），A-学科4个（外国语言文学、物理学、生物学、马克思主义理论），A-及以上共14个学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工类专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"），与华东师大物理类招生的计算机、软件工程、统计学、微电子等专业方向匹配；师范/教育类专业热度呈"分化观望"态势。重庆2026年普通高考总人数约20.9万，按近年比例估算物理类约13.5万人，较2025年物理类13.95万人减少约2.9%，考生规模小幅收缩，竞争略有缓解；华东师范大学位于上海市（直辖市），对重庆考生而言属于跨省报考热门选项；该校在重庆招生计划占比较小（约40余人），属典型的外省高水平大学招生规模，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3140名、2026年扩招约7.3%（使位次后移）、重庆物理类考生减少约2.9%（使位次前移）、学校声誉平稳偏正面、抖音热度较热等因素，扩招影响略大于考生减少影响，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约3288名，区间2820–3756名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of East China Normal University in Chongqing Physics Category were approximately 3980 → 2985 → 2814 → 3507 → 3140, showing a fluctuating trend. Rankings continuously moved forward from 2021 to 2023 (from 3980 to 2814), then significantly moved backward to 3507 in 2024, and rebounded to 3140 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years (about 300–700 places). The 2025 baseline is approximately 3140. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing: 40 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 41 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 44, an increase of 3 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 7.3%), which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable in the 28–31 range in recent years), it is a top-tier normal university nationwide with an extremely high academic level. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no significant negative public opinion was observed for East China Normal University. The university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 28th (rated as 'relatively hot'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.7 million, and short video exposure at an upper-middle level. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission gaps or abnormal admissions, with overall reputation stable and slightly positive. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, East China Normal University has 3 A+ disciplines (Physical Education, Education, Statistics), 7 A disciplines (World History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Mathematics, Ecology, Software Engineering), and 4 A- disciplines (Foreign Languages and Literature, Physics, Biology, Marxist Theory), totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (all rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in 2024), matching the majors offered in East China Normal University's Physics Category, including Computer Science, Software Engineering, Statistics, and Microelectronics. The popularity of teacher training/education majors shows a 'differentiated wait-and-see' trend. The total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Chongqing in 2026 is about 209,000, with an estimated 135,000 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, a decrease of about 2.9% from 139,500 in 2025, indicating a slight contraction in the candidate pool and a slight easing of competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai (a municipality directly under the central government), making it a popular cross-province application choice for Chongqing candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing is relatively small (about 40+ students), typical of high-level universities from other provinces, with a neutral impact on application popularity due to regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3140, an enrollment expansion of about 7.3% in 2026 (causing rankings to move backward), a decrease of about 2.9% in Chongqing Physics Category candidates (causing rankings to move forward), a stable and slightly positive school reputation, and relatively hot Douyin popularity, the impact of enrollment expansion slightly outweighs the impact of the decrease in candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3288, with a range of 2820–3756.

- Artificial Intelligence (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2820–3756, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics, Computer Science, Statistics, Software) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 2800), focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., around 3700), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety. The two new majors in 2026, Cryptography Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence, have no historical data for reference, so applicants should carefully evaluate based on personal interests when applying.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of East China Normal University in Chongqing's History Category were approximately 587, 586, 868, 773, and 707 respectively, showing a trend of 'stable first, then drop, then rebound'. In 2021-2022, it stabilized at 586-587, dropped significantly to 868 in 2023 (a drop of about 280), rebounded to 773 in 2024, and moved forward to 707 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 100-280, with a baseline of about 707 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category: 18 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 22 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22, unchanged from 2025, with a stable enrollment scale and no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a very high level of education and sustained appeal to liberal arts students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no significant negative public opinion was found for East China Normal University. The university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 28th (rated as 'relatively hot'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.7 million. From 2021 to 2025, there were no instances of enrollment gaps or abnormal admissions records, with overall reputation stable and slightly positive. East China Normal University has outstanding strengths in humanities and social sciences: Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Psychology A, Statistics A+, Marxist Theory A-, which highly match the History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, International Chinese Education, Marxist Theory, Journalism and Communication, Finance, etc.), and the disciplinary advantages have a positive pull on applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Chinese Language/Literature majors is 'recommended' (2024), Law shows 'differentiated wait-and-see', Teacher Education/Education shows 'differentiated wait-and-see', and Journalism and Communication shows 'clearly discouraged'. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Chongqing is about 209,000. Based on recent years' proportions, the History Category is estimated to have about 73,600 people, a slight increase of about 0.3% compared to 73,400 in 2025, with the number of test takers basically flat. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, making it a popular cross-provincial choice for Chongqing liberal arts students. The university enrolls about 22 students in Chongqing's History Category, a small but stable number, with neutral regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 707, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, a slight increase of about 0.3% in Chongqing's History Category test takers, a stable and slightly positive university reputation, relatively hot Douyin popularity, and high match between advantageous disciplines and enrollment majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 717, with a range of 615-819.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 615-819, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law Double Degree) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Education) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 600), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 800), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety. The new Finance Double Degree major in 2026 has no historical data for reference, so when applying, you need to evaluate based on personal interest.
